async handleToolCall(name: string, args: any) {
switch(name) {
case 'enrich_company':
return this.enrichCompany(args.companyName, args.state);
case 'get_ucc_filings':
return this.getUCCFilings(args.companyName);
case 'monitor_health':
return this.monitorBusinessHealth(args.companyId);
}
}
private async enrichCompany(name: string, state: string) {
const sources = this.getDataSourcesForTier();
const results = await Promise.allSettled([
sources.fetchUCCFilings(name, state),
sources.fetchSECData(name),
sources.fetchOSHAViolations(name),
// Additional sources based on tier
]);
return this.mergeAndNormalize(results);
}
}
